name: Echo Question
description: Sound returning from vast space as open question

prompts.label: sound returning from vast space as haunting open question
prompts.text: sound returning from vast space as haunting open question, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.text: reverb trail curling upward with unresolved inquiry, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: distant echo bending into questioning inflection
